mapper.select: SELECT wx.* FROM hr_work_experience wx WHERE wx.PERSON_ID = #{personId} AND wx.ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY wx.START_DATE DESC

SELECT wx.*, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME, e.DEPTNO FROM hr_work_experience wx INNER JOIN hr_employee e ON wx.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID WHERE wx.ACTIVITY = 1 AND e.ACTIVITY = 1
AND e.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND e.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND wx.CPNY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{companyName} || '%'
ORDER BY e.EMPID, wx.START_DATE DESC
SELECT wx.*, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME, e.DEPTNO FROM hr_work_experience wx LEFT JOIN hr_employee e ON wx.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID WHERE wx.WORK_EXPER_NO = #{workExpNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hr_work_experience ( WORK_EXPER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_NAME, DEPT_NAME, POSITION, DUTY, PAY_YEAR, RESIGN_REASON, WITNESS, CELLPHONE, AGE_LIMIT, WORK_ADDRESS, SENIORITY_RESPONSE, REMARK, CPNY_ENGLISH_NAME, PRO_CPNY_PHONE, OVERSEAS, NATIONALITY, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, START_DATE, END_DATE, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( HR_W_EXP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{cpnyName}, #{deptName}, #{position}, #{duty}, #{payYear}, #{resignReason}, #{witness}, #{cellphone}, #{ageLimit}, #{workAddress}, #{seniorityResponse}, #{remark}, #{cpnyEnglishName}, #{proCpnyPhone}, #{overseas}, #{nationality}, #{startMonth}, #{endMonth}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{orderNo}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE hr_work_experience SET CPNY_NAME = #{cpnyName}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName}, POSITION = #{position}, DUTY = #{duty}, PAY_YEAR = #{payYear}, RESIGN_REASON = #{resignReason}, WITNESS = #{witness}, CELLPHONE = #{cellphone}, AGE_LIMIT = #{ageLimit}, WORK_ADDRESS = #{workAddress}, SENIORITY_RESPONSE = #{seniorityResponse}, REMARK = #{remark}, CPNY_ENGLISH_NAME = #{cpnyEnglishName}, PRO_CPNY_PHONE = #{proCpnyPhone}, OVERSEAS = #{overseas}, NATIONALITY = #{nationality}, START_MONTH = #{startMonth}, END_MONTH = #{endMonth}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE WORK_EXPER_NO = #{workExpNo}
